data.title: Korean company targeting Vietnam's healthy snack market with Black Barley Brown Rice Chips. Entry accelerated in Dec 2025.
data.description: South Korean company THE HONEST FARMER Co Ltd recently revealed plans to expand into the Vietnamese market at a quicker pace. Known for their healthy snack foods, the company is introducing their popular Black Barley Brown Rice Chip in Vietnam. THE HONEST FARMER, based in Yeongcheon, Gyeongsangbuk-do, aims to tap into the growing demand for nutritious snacks in Vietnam and capitalize on this opportunity for growth. Its signature product, the Black Barley Brown Rice Chip, has established a strong presence in South Korea and is set to make its mark in the Vietnamese market.

data.title: Bitcoin could reach $110,000 by January 2026 despite current pullback to $92,499, showing 19% potential upside in 6-8 weeks. Technical indicators hint at bullish momentum.
data.description: The Bitcoin forecast indicates a potential 19% increase to $110,000 in the next 6-8 weeks. Despite a recent drop to $92,499, technical indicators point to bullish momentum.

data.title: CIIE 2025 showcases global markets - 8th expo held in Shanghai, 6 guest countries of honor, November 5-10, 2025.
data.description: In Shanghai, the National Exhibition and Convention Center (NECC) hosted the eighth China International Import Expo (CIIE) from November 5 to 10, 2025. The expo, symbolized by the "Four-Leaf Clover" shape, once again solidified its position as the global business hub. Six guest countries of honor, including Sweden, the United Arab Emirates, Colombia, Nigeria, Thailand, and Georgia, from four continents, showcased a joint dedication to open and sustainable development. The event featured a new section to enhance the participant experience.
China’s Nvidia-like Moore Threads stock skyrockets 469% post $1.5 billion IPO.

data.title: ORIC presents promising data on Enozertinib at ESMO Asia Congress 2025: 80% ORR in 1L EGFR PACC, 100% intracranial ORR in NSCLC patients with EGFR atypical mutations.
data.description: A recent study revealed promising results for the highly differentiated 1L EGFR PACC treatment, showing a preliminary systemic activity with an 80% Overall Response Rate (ORR) and a 100% intracranial ORR. These results were observed in patients with active brain metastases, indicating a potentially effective treatment option for this group of patients.
Copper prices in Shanghai hit an all-time peak, with the contract at 91,770 yuan/ton.
Asian equities show a mixed trend with focus on upcoming U.S. data and possible Fed rate cut.

data.title: Bitwise CIO: No pressure to sell Bitcoin with $1.4B cash, no debt until 2027, and price above cost basis.
data.description: Matt Hougan argues that Strategy currently holds $1.4 billion in cash and does not have any debt obligations until 2027. Additionally, the current price of Bitcoin is higher than the company's original cost basis, leading to the belief that a sale is improbable at this time.

data.title: SoFi announces public offering of 54.5M shares at $27.50/sh for total $1.5B, with option for underwriters to purchase more.
data.description: In San Francisco, SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI) disclosed the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 54,545,454 common stock shares at $27.50 per share. The offering is expected to generate around $1.5 billion in gross proceeds, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses. SoFi has also provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire an additional undisclosed amount of shares.
